title: Happy Pride Moths! + Mystic's Biomes Compat
description: A very basic mod that makes Mystic's Biomes' Glass Jar capture Moths and moth jars give Mystic's Biomes' Glass Jar back.
body: This mod removes the crafting recipe for Pride Moths' Glass Jar. Instead, the Glass Jar added by Mystic's Biomes now captures Moths. Also retextures the Pride Moths Jars so it looks the same as the Mystic's Biomes variant.
